page.title: Celebrate Marbella Feria 2027 with a Boat Charter Party

data.meta_description: Celebrate Marbella Feria 2027 with a boat charter party from Puerto Banús. Prices from €749/2h. Licensed skipper, drinks & snacks included. Book now.
data.summary: Celebrate Marbella Feria 2027 with a boat charter party from Puerto Banús. Our fleet offers options from €749/2h, including skipper, drinks, and snacks.
key_facts: Feria 2027 runs early June in Marbella & Puerto Banús (dates TBC).
Boat charter parties depart from Puerto Banús marina.
Prices from €749/2h (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39, all inclusive).
Tier B Mangusta 80 (24m) from €4,719/4h, includes a free jet ski.
Every charter includes licensed skipper, fuel, insurance & 21% IVA.
Drinks: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava & light snacks.
Max capacity: 12 pax on most yachts; smaller boats for 5-10 pax.
Book via WhatsApp for custom durations & boat options.

faq.a: The Marbella Feria (Feria de San Bernabé) is an annual week-long festival in early June, celebrating Marbella’s patron saint. Expect flamenco, fairgrounds, casetas (tents), live music, and a festive atmosphere across Marbella and Puerto Banús. Exact 2027 dates are usually announced in early spring.

faq.q: Can I charter a boat during the Feria?
faq.a: Yes, we operate daily from Puerto Banús, including Feria week. Many guests book a daytime charter to see the fair from the sea, then return for evening festivities. Availability is limited, so early booking is advised.

faq.q: How much does a Feria boat charter cost?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B Mangusta 80 (including white/grey variants) is €4,719 minimum 4 hours, with a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

faq.q: How many people can join a Feria boat party?
faq.a: Capacity varies: Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 take 9-11 pax; Mangusta 80 and most larger yachts take 12 pax. Smaller boats like Dubhe (5 pax) or Mariah SX21 (5 pax) are ideal for intimate groups.

faq.q: Where do the boats depart from?
faq.a: All our boats depart from Puerto Banús marina, the heart of Marbella’s luxury yachting scene. You’ll be just steps from the Feria casetas and the Golden Mile.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food or decorations?
faq.a: Yes, you’re welcome to bring your own food and decorations (e.g., Feria-themed banners). Just let us know in advance so we can accommodate. Our standard drinks and snacks are already included.

faq.q: How do I book a Feria boat charter?
faq.a: Book directly via WhatsApp on our website. Specify your preferred boat, duration, and group size. We’ll confirm availability and send a secure payment link. Early booking is recommended for Feria week.

data.body_html:
Marbella Feria 2027 is the perfect excuse to trade the crowded casetas for a private deck on the Mediterranean. A marbella feria yacht charter 2027 lets you celebrate with your group, away from the queues, with your own skipper, drinks, and snacks—all included. Depart from Puerto Banús and watch the fairground lights twinkle from the water.

Why charter a boat for Marbella Feria 2027?

The Feria de San Bernabé draws thousands to Marbella and Puerto Banús every June. Instead of fighting for a table at a caseta, book a private yacht. You get a floating party base with a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and a full drinks package (water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava) plus light snacks. No hidden costs, no time limits on the bar.

Our fleet departs from Boat Rental Marbella at Puerto Banús, putting you minutes from the action. After your cruise, step ashore and join the festivities on the Golden Mile.

Our Feria-ready fleet

We operate a range of boats from Puerto Banús. For Feria parties, these are the most popular choices:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – from €749/2h
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – from €749/2h
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – from €4,719/4h (includes free jet ski)
  • Mangusta 80 Grey (24m, 12 pax) – same Tier B pricing
  • Mangusta 80 White (24m, 12 pax) – same Tier B pricing
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) – pricing on request
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – pricing on request

All boats include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA. Smaller groups can choose Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) or Mariah SX21 (6.4m, 5 pax) – both depart from Puerto Banús.

Feria 2027 dates and timing

The Marbella Feria typically runs for one week in early June, culminating on the weekend. Exact 2027 dates are confirmed by the town hall in spring. Most charters are available daily from 10:00 to sunset. Popular slots for Feria parties are 14:00–18:00 (afternoon cruise) or 18:00–22:00 (sunset with fair lights).

Book early – Feria week is our busiest period. Contact us via WhatsApp to secure your preferred time.

What to expect on your Feria yacht charter

Your charter includes a licensed skipper who knows the coast from Puerto Banús to Cabopino, Estepona, or Sotogrande. You can anchor at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for a swim. The drinks package covers soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava – perfect for toasting the Feria. Bring your own food or decorations; we’ll help set up.

For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 (24m) comes with a free jet ski – add some adrenaline between the cava toasts. All safety equipment is onboard and compliant with Spanish regulations.

How to book your Marbella Feria 2027 yacht charter

Booking is simple: visit our Boat Rental Marbella page, choose your boat, and send us a WhatsApp message. We’ll confirm availability, send a secure payment link, and provide boarding instructions. No deposit scams – we’re a legitimate operator based in Puerto Banús.

For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), prices are fixed: €749/2h, €1,299/4h, €1,799/6h, €2,299/8h. Tier B (Mangusta 80) is €4,719 minimum 4h. All other boats are priced on request.

Make it a Feria weekend

Combine your boat charter with a stay on the Golden Mile or in Puerto Banús. After your cruise, walk to the Feria fairground or the casetas for live music and dancing. The contrast of a serene sea escape and the vibrant Feria energy is unforgettable.

Check out our Marbella Feria yacht charter 2027 guide for more tips on planning your celebration.

Frequently asked questions

What is the Marbella Feria 2027?

The Marbella Feria (Feria de San Bernabé) is an annual week-long festival in early June, celebrating Marbella’s patron saint. Expect flamenco, fairgrounds, casetas (tents), live music, and a festive atmosphere across Marbella and Puerto Banús. Exact 2027 dates are usually announced in early spring.

Can I charter a boat during the Feria?

Yes, we operate daily from Puerto Banús, including Feria week. Many guests book a daytime charter to see the fair from the sea, then return for evening festivities. Availability is limited, so early booking is advised.

How much does a Feria boat charter cost?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B Mangusta 80 (including white/grey variants) is €4,719 minimum 4 hours, with a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

How many people can join a Feria boat party?

Capacity varies: Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 take 9-11 pax; Mangusta 80 and most larger yachts take 12 pax. Smaller boats like Dubhe (5 pax) or Mariah SX21 (5 pax) are ideal for intimate groups.

Where do the boats depart from?

All our boats depart from Puerto Banús marina, the heart of Marbella’s luxury yachting scene. You’ll be just steps from the Feria casetas and the Golden Mile.

Can we bring our own food or decorations?

Yes, you’re welcome to bring your own food and decorations (e.g., Feria-themed banners). Just let us know in advance so we can accommodate. Our standard drinks and snacks are already included.

How do I book a Feria boat charter?

Book directly via WhatsApp on our website. Specify your preferred boat, duration, and group size. We’ll confirm availability and send a secure payment link. Early booking is recommended for Feria week.
